name: Install as standalone app
description: Changes the Google app package identity so the patched APK can be installed beside the system Google app.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The package name to use for the standalone patched app.

options.title: App name
options.description: The launcher name to use for the standalone patched app.

name: Remove Discover feed ads
description: Filters likely ad nodes from the Google app Discover feed.
